arts.ttl: Club ‘would not oppose’ January transfer as Leicester and Tottenham eye player – Asking price not high
arts.sum: Udinese would be willing to sell defender Thomas Kristensen this month if Tottenham or Leicester City make moves for him. That’s according to Messaggero Veneto, who say both sides have shown an interest in the 22-year-old in this window. Fixtures Aston Villa Vs. Leicester City - Sat, Jan 4th 2025, 15:00 Aston Villa continued preparations for Saturday's game against Leicester City at Bodymoor Heath, as 2025 got underway. Unai Emery's side wrapped up 2024 on Monday, with a 2-2 draw against Brighton & Hove Albion at Villa Park, and will welcome the Foxes to B6 this weekend in their first outing of the New Year. The Villans brought in 2025 by continuing to work on the training pitch ahead of their next clash, in which they will look to complete a first Premier League double of the campaign, having triumphed 2-1 at the King Power Stadium on the final day of August. That’s according to BILD, who say the German side are hoping that a deal Malen will be concluded as they need the money to do their own business this month.
